signals.headline: Incoming Bank of Korea Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Consumer Inflation Amid Middle East Shocks | NO | HIGH con
signals.raw:
Incoming Bank of Korea Governor Nominee Warns of Accelerating Consumer Inflation Amid Middle East Shocks | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bank of Korea Governor nominee Shin Hyun-song stated on April 14, 2026, that headline consumer inflation is likely to accelerate, driven by surging import prices from the Middle East conflict, marking the sharpest jump in nearly three decades[1][3][5].  
This follows

signals.headline: VP JD Vance** on **April 10 warned Iran** against "playing" the U
signals.raw:
VP JD Vance** on **April 10 warned Iran** against "playing" the U.S. ahead of failed Pakistan talks, amid **Trump's threats** to reload warships and "obliterate" Iran if negotiations collapse.[1]  
A **2-week US-Israel-Iran ceasefire** was agreed post-Pakistan talks (date unspecified, but recent), though no new Vance-White House obliteration-related updates today.[3]
